about.title: About ThinkFLOW
about.description: Built by Daniel Burcea — AI Systems Architect since 2025.
about.bio1: I'm Daniel Burcea, an AI Systems Architect building private AI infrastructure since 2025. My focus is on creating autonomous systems that replace hourly billing with predictable delivery through sovereign AI.
about.bio2: ThinkFLOW is the result of that vision — a technical consulting practice specializing in private LLM deployment, RAG pipelines, agent orchestration, and high-performance web development.
about.expertiseDesc: Python, LangGraph, TypeScript, Next.js, React, Docker, PostgreSQL, Supabase, vector databases, LLM fine-tuning, RAG architectures, and autonomous agent systems.
